name: Snyk breadth — auth token persisted in localStorage

provenance.note: Constructed snippet illustrating insecure credential storage — an auth token written to localStorage where any XSS can read it. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side calls localStorage.setItem('authToken', token); safe (-) side keeps the token in a module-scoped in-memory variable backed by an httpOnly cookie. Key name contains 'token' / 'auth', a TP trigger per R-06.
